What we do

Four ways we build leverage
into your business.

From a single automation to a full technology transformation — we scope tightly and ship fast.

01 — AI & AUTOMATION

AI & Automation

Lead capture, document processing, AI agents, reporting — all automated. Your team focuses on growth, not admin.

n8nMakeGPT-4oClaudeWhatsApp API

02 — CUSTOM DEVELOPMENT

Custom Web & Mobile Apps

React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, PHP, native iOS & Android. Production-grade, shipped in weeks not months.

ReactNext.jsPythonPHPiOSAndroid
EXPLORE SERVICE →
03 — FRACTIONAL CTO

CTO Advisory

Fractional CTO for companies that need senior technical leadership without a full-time hire. Architecture, team, vendor selection, M&A tech advisory, and engineering hiring.

Tech strategyArchitectureTeam leadershipUiPathMicrosoft Power PlatformM&A Tech AdvisoryVendor SelectionEngineering Hiring
EXPLORE SERVICE →
04 — TRANSFORMATION

Digital Transformation

Full-scope digital audits and transformation programmes. We map inefficiencies and implement the systems to fix them.

Digital auditProcess redesignChange mgmt

Automate my business →How it works
How we work

From first call to live system —
in weeks, not months.

Fixed-price proposals. Clear deliverables. No bloated retainers. No surprises.

01

Automation audit

We map your workflows, identify where time is lost, and quantify the impact. Free for qualified leads.

1–2 DAYS
02

Design & scoping

Architecture decisions, tool selection, and a fixed-price proposal with clear milestones.

3–5 DAYS
03

Build & test

Iterative sprints with weekly demos. You see progress every week, not after months of silence.

2–8 WEEKS
04

Launch & handover

Full documentation, team training, and 30-day post-launch support. You own everything.

1 WEEK
Start a project →
Real estate brokerage · Dubai · 12 agents

Drag the handle to compare — left is before, right is after

Reporting6+ hrs

Revenue recov.AED 18K

Discovery call & audit
Week 1

Deep domain knowledge means we build systems that actually fit how your business works.

Client results

What our clients say.

“

Tergo built our entire lead automation system in 3 weeks. Response times went from 4 hours to under 2 minutes. Our agents now handle 40% more enquiries with the same headcount.

AA
Ahmed Al-Rashidi
CEO, Bayut Premium
“

The IoT alert system they built for our greenhouses has saved us from three critical failures in six months. Real-time notifications to the right people, every time.

IP
Ion Popescu
Operations Director, Agri Novatex
“

Francesco architected our entire tech stack as fractional CTO. He thinks like a founder, not a consultant. We shipped our MVP 6 weeks ahead of schedule.

PS
Priya Sharma
Founder, PropTech Startup
“

Our Monday morning KPI reports used to take the team 6 hours. Now they arrive automatically at 7am with zero manual work. Absolute game changer.

MB
Marco Bianchi
COO, Hospitality Group
“

The client onboarding automation they built turned a 2-day manual process into a 15-minute automated flow. Our clients love the experience and our team loves the time back.

SM
Sarah Mitchell
Managing Partner, Advisory Firm

The founders

Built by people who ship.

No account managers or junior teams. You work directly with our founders — who have built and shipped over 100 digital products.

CEOStrategyClient Partnerships

Maria Terragni

CEO & Co-Founder

10+ years leading digital transformation projects across real estate, travel, and professional services. Former management consultant, now building AI-first businesses.

Business strategyDigital transformationClient leadership
LinkedIn →
CTOEngineeringAI Architecture

Francesco Terragni

CTO & Co-Founder

Full-stack engineer and AI architect with 10+ years building production systems. Specialises in automation infrastructure, AI pipelines, and custom software at scale.

React / Next.jsNode.js / PythonAI pipelinesn8n / Make
LinkedIn →
+13
Engineers based in Romania

Our engineering team is distributed across Bucharest, Cluj-Napoca, and Timișoara — senior developers specialising in React, Node.js, Python, AI pipelines, and IoT systems. No juniors. No outsourcing.

Where we are

Three offices.
One team.

We work across time zones so your project never sleeps.
